# common-web-chars

Commonly used unicode characters for copywriting using similar named entity syntax.

For more information about espanso packages, read the [documentation](https://espanso.org/docs/).

## Installation

```
espanso install common-web-chars
```

## Usage

### Basic symbol characters

| Shortcut | Char | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| `;(r);` | ® | registered |
| `;(c);` | © | copyright |
| `;(p);` | ℗ | phonogram copyright |
| `;(m);` | Ⓜ | Canadian mark |
| `;(wz);` | 🄮 | Warenzeichen |
| `;tm;` | ™ | trademark |
| `;sm;` | ℠ | service mark |
| `;mq;` | 🅪 | marque de commerce |
| `;lsq;` | ‘ | left single-quote |
| `;rsq;` | ’ | right single-quote |
| `;ldq;` | “ | left double-quote |
| `;rdq;` | ” | right double-quote |
| `;laq;` | « | left angle-quote |
| `;raq;` | » | right angle-quote |
| `;lsaq;` | ‹ | left single-angle-quote |
| `;rsaq;` | › | right single-angle-quote |
| `;zws;` | \u200B | zero width space |
| `;nobr;` | \u2060 | non-breaking word joiner |
| `;replace;` | � | replacement character |

### Common named characters

| Entity | Char | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `;reg;` | ® | registered |
| `;copy;` | © | copyright|
| `;copysr;` | ℗ | phonogram copyright |
| `;trade;` | ™ | trademark |
| `;deg;` | ° | degrees |
| `;cent;` | ¢ | cent |
| `;euro;` | € | euro |
| `;yen;` | ¥ | yen |
| `;times;` | × | times |
| `;divide;` | ÷ | divide |
| `;plusmn;` | ± | plus minus |
| `;lsquo;` | ‘ | left single-quote |
| `;rsquo;` | ’ | right single-quote |
| `;ldquo;` | “ | left double-quote |
| `;rdquo;` | ” | right double-quote |
| `;laquo;` | « | left angle-quote |
| `;raquo;` | » | right angle-quote |
| `;lsaquo;` | ‹ | left single-angle-quote |
| `;rsaquo;` | › | right single-angle-quote |
| `;shy;` | \u00ad | soft-hyphen |
| `;ndash;` | – | en-dash |
| `;mdash;` | — | em-dash |
| `;horbar;` | ― | horizontal bar |
| `;nbsp;` | \u00a0 | non-breaking space |
| `;hellip;` | … | ellipses |
| `;bull;` | • | bullet |
| `;iexcl;` | ¡ | inverted exclamation |
| `;iquest;` | ¿ | inverted question |
| `;sect;` | § | section |
| `;para;` | ¶ | paragraph |
| `;dagger;` | † | dagger |
| `;ddagger;` | ‡ | double dagger |

### Special whitespace

| Entity | Char | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `;ensp;` | \u2002 | en space |
| `;emsp;` | \u2003 | em space |
| `;emsp13;` | \u2004 | three-per-em space |
| `;emsp14;` | \u2005 | four-per-em space |
| `;numsp;` | \u2007 | figure space |
| `;puncsp;` | \u2008 | punctuation space |
| `;thinsp;` | \u2009 | thin space |
| `;hairsp;` | \u200A | hair space |
| `;ZeroWidthSpace;` | \u200B | zero width space |
| `;zwnj;` | \u200C | zero width non-joiner |
| `;zwj;` | \u200D | zero width joiner |
| `;MediumSpace;` | \u205F | medium space |
| `;ThickSpace;` | \u205F\u200A | medium space, hair space |
| `;NoBreak;` | \u2060 | non-breaking word joiner |

### Latin-1 Supplement misc.

Other named characters not covered above.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Latin-1_Supplement

| Entity | Char | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `;curren;` | ¤ | Currency sign |
| `;brvbar;` | ¦ | Broken bar |
| `;uml;` | ¨ | Diaeresis (Umlaut) |
| `;ordf;` | ª | Feminine Ordinal Indicator |
| `;not;` | ¬ | Not sign |
| `;macr;` | ¯ | Macron |
| `;sup2;` | ² | Superscript two |
| `;sup3;` | ³ | Superscript three |
| `;acute;` | ´ | Acute accent |
| `;micro;` | µ | Micro sign |
| `;middot;` | · | Middle dot |
| `;cedil;` | ¸ | Cedilla |
| `;sup1;` | ¹ | Superscript one |
| `;ordm;` | º | Masculine ordinal indicator |
| `;frac14;` | ¼ | Vulgar fraction one quarter |
| `;frac12;` | ½ | Vulgar fraction one half |
| `;frac34;` | ¾ | Vulgar fraction three quarters |
| `;Agrave;` | À | Capital Letter A with grave |
| `;Aacute;` | Á | Capital letter A with acute |
| `;Acirc;` | Â | Capital letter A with circumflex |
| `;Atilde;` | Ã | Capital letter A with tilde |
| `;Auml;` | Ä | Capital letter A with diaeresis |
| `;Aring;` | Å | Capital letter A with ring above |
| `;AElig;` | Æ | Capital letter Æ |
| `;Ccedil;` | Ç | Capital letter C with cedilla |
| `;Egrave;` | È | Capital letter E with grave |
| `;Eacute;` | É | Capital letter E with acute |
| `;Ecirc;` | Ê | Capital letter E with circumflex |
| `;Euml;` | Ë | Capital letter E with diaeresis |
| `;Igrave;` | Ì | Capital letter I with grave |
| `;Iacute;` | Í | Capital letter I with acute |
| `;Icirc;` | Î | Capital letter I with circumflex |
| `;Iuml;` | Ï | Capital letter I with diaeresis |
| `;ETH;` | Ð | Capital letter Eth |
| `;Ntilde;` | Ñ | Capital letter N with tilde |
| `;Ograve;` | Ò | Capital letter O with grave |
| `;Oacute;` | Ó | Capital letter O with acute |
| `;Ocirc;` | Ô | Capital letter O with circumflex |
| `;Otilde;` | Õ | Capital letter O with tilde |
| `;Ouml;` | Ö | Capital letter O with diaeresis |
| `;Oslash;` | Ø | Capital letter O with stroke |
| `;Ugrave;` | Ù | Capital letter U with grave |
| `;Uacute;` | Ú | Capital letter U with acute |
| `;Ucirc;` | Û | Capital Letter U with circumflex |
| `;Uuml;` | Ü | Capital Letter U with diaeresis |
| `;Yacute;` | Ý | Capital Letter Y with acute |
| `;THORN;` | Þ | Capital Letter Thorn |
| `;szlig;` | ß | Small Letter sharp S |
| `;agrave;` | à | Small Letter A with grave |
| `;aacute;` | á | Small Letter A with acute |
| `;acirc;` | â | Small Letter A with circumflex |
| `;atilde;` | ã | Small Letter A with tilde |
| `;auml;` | ä | Small Letter A with diaeresis |
| `;aring;` | å | Small Letter A with ring above |
| `;aelig;` | æ | Small Letter Æ |
| `;ccedil;` | ç | Small Letter C with cedilla |
| `;egrave;` | è | Small Letter E with grave |
| `;eacute;` | é | Small Letter E with acute |
| `;ecirc;` | ê | Small Letter E with circumflex |
| `;euml;` | ë | Small Letter E with diaeresis |
| `;igrave;` | ì | Small Letter I with grave |
| `;iacute;` | í | Small Letter I with acute |
| `;icirc;` | î | Small Letter I with circumflex |
| `;iuml;` | ï | Small Letter I with diaeresis |
| `;eth;` | ð | Small Letter Eth |
| `;ntilde;` | ñ | Small Letter N with tilde |
| `;ograve;` | ò | Small Letter O with grave |
| `;oacute;` | ó | Small Letter O with acute |
| `;ocirc;` | ô | Small Letter O with circumflex |
| `;otilde;` | õ | Small Letter O with tilde |
| `;ouml;` | ö | Small Letter O with diaeresis |
| `;oslash;` | ø | Small Letter O with stroke |
| `;ugrave;` | ù | Small Letter U with grave |
| `;uacute;` | ú | Small Letter U with acute |
| `;ucirc;` | û | Small Letter U with circumflex |
| `;uuml;` | ü | Small Letter U with diaeresis |
| `;yacute;` | ý | Small Letter Y with acute |
| `;thorn;` | þ | Small Letter Thorn |
| `;yuml;` | ÿ | Small Letter Y with diaeresis |

### Latin Extended-A

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Latin_Extended-A

| Entity | Letter | Description |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| `;Amacr;` | Ā | Capital Letter A with macron |
| `;amacr;` | ā | Small Letter A with macron |
| `;Abreve;` | Ă | Capital Letter A with breve |
| `;abreve;` | ă | Small Letter A with breve |
| `;Aogon;` | Ą | Capital Letter A with ogonek |
| `;aogon;` | ą | Small Letter A with ogonek |
| `;Cacute;` | Ć | Capital Letter C with acute |
| `;cacute;` | ć | Small Letter C with acute |
| `;Ccirc;` | Ĉ | Capital Letter C with circumflex |
| `;ccirc;` | ĉ | Small Letter C with circumflex |
| `;Cdot;` | Ċ | Capital Letter C with dot above |
| `;cdot;` | ċ | Small Letter C with dot above |
| `;Ccaron;` | Č | Capital Letter C with caron |
| `;ccaron;` | č | Small Letter C with caron |
| `;Dcaron;` | Ď | Capital Letter D with caron |
| `;dcaron;` | ď | Small Letter D with caron |
| `;Dstrok;` | Đ | Capital Letter D with stroke |
| `;dstrok;` | đ | Small Letter D with stroke |
| `;Emacr;` | Ē | Capital Letter E with macron |
| `;emacr;` | ē | Small Letter E with macron |
| `;Ebreve;` | Ĕ | Capital Letter E with breve |
| `;ebreve;` | ĕ | Small Letter E with breve |
| `;Edot;` | Ė | Capital Letter E with dot above |
| `;edot;` | ė | Small Letter E with dot above |
| `;Eogon;` | Ę | Capital Letter E with ogonek |
| `;eogon;` | ę | Small Letter E with ogonek |
| `;Ecaron;` | Ě | Capital Letter E with caron |
| `;ecaron;` | ě | Small Letter E with caron |
| `;Gcirc;` | Ĝ | Capital Letter G with circumflex |
| `;gcirc;` | ĝ | Small Letter G with circumflex |
| `;Gbreve;` | Ğ | Capital Letter G with breve |
| `;gbreve;` | ğ | Small Letter G with breve |
| `;Gdot;` | Ġ | Capital Letter G with dot above |
| `;gdot;` | ġ | Small Letter G with dot above |
| `;Gcedil;` | Ģ | Capital Letter G with cedilla |
| `;gcedil;` | ģ | Small Letter G with cedilla |
| `;Hcirc;` | Ĥ | Capital Letter H with circumflex |
| `;hcirc;` | ĥ | Small Letter H with circumflex |
| `;Hstrok;` | Ħ | Capital Letter H with stroke |
| `;hstrok;` | ħ | Small Letter H with stroke |
| `;Itilde;` | Ĩ | Capital Letter I with tilde |
| `;itilde;` | ĩ | Small Letter I with tilde |
| `;Imacr;` | Ī | Capital Letter I with macron |
| `;imacr;` | ī | Small Letter I with macron |
| `;Ibreve;` | Ĭ | Capital Letter I with breve |
| `;ibreve;` | ĭ | Small Letter I with breve |
| `;Iogon;` | Į | Capital Letter I with ogonek |
| `;iogon;` | į | Small Letter I with ogonek |
| `;Idot;` | İ | Capital Letter I with dot above |
| `;inodot;` | ı | Small Letter dotless I |
| `;IJlig;` | Ĳ | Capital Ligature IJ |
| `;ijlig;` | ĳ | Small Ligature IJ |
| `;Jcirc;` | Ĵ | Capital Letter J with circumflex |
| `;jcirc;` | ĵ | Small Letter J with circumflex |
| `;Kcedil;` | Ķ | Capital Letter K with cedilla |
| `;kcedil;` | ķ | Small Letter K with cedilla |
| `;kgreen;` | ĸ | Small Letter Kra |
| `;Lacute;` | Ĺ | Capital Letter L with acute |
| `;lacute;` | ĺ | Small Letter L with acute |
| `;Lcedil;` | Ļ | Capital Letter L with cedilla |
| `;lcedil;` | ļ | Small Letter L with cedilla |
| `;Lcaron;` | Ľ | Capital Letter L with caron |
| `;lcaron;` | ľ | Small Letter L with caron |
| `;Lmidot;` | Ŀ | Capital Letter L with middle dot |
| `;lmidot;` | ŀ | Small Letter L with middle dot |
| `;Lstrok;` | Ł | Capital Letter L with stroke |
| `;lstrok;` | ł | Small Letter L with stroke |
| `;Nacute;` | Ń | Capital Letter N with acute |
| `;nacute;` | ń | Small Letter N with acute |
| `;Ncedil;` | Ņ | Capital Letter N with cedilla |
| `;ncedil;` | ņ | Small Letter N with cedilla |
| `;Ncaron;` | Ň | Capital Letter N with caron |
| `;ncaron;` | ň | Small Letter N with caron |
| `;napos;` | ŉ | Small Letter N preceded by apostrophe[2] |
| `;ENG;` | Ŋ | Capital Letter Eng |
| `;eng;` | ŋ | Small Letter Eng |
| `;Omacr;` | Ō | Capital Letter O with macron |
| `;omacr;` | ō | Small Letter O with macron |
| `;Obreve;` | Ŏ | Capital Letter O with breve |
| `;obreve;` | ŏ | Small Letter O with breve |
| `;Odblac;` | Ő | Capital Letter O with double acute |
| `;odblac;` | ő | Small Letter O with double acute |
| `;OElig;` | Œ | Capital Ligature OE |
| `;oelig;` | œ | Small Ligature OE |
| `;Racute;` | Ŕ | Capital Letter R with acute |
| `;racute;` | ŕ | Small Letter R with acute |
| `;Rcedil;` | Ŗ | Capital Letter R with cedilla |
| `;rcedil;` | ŗ | Small Letter R with cedilla |
| `;Rcaron;` | Ř | Capital Letter R with caron |
| `;rcaron;` | ř | Small Letter R with caron |
| `;Sacute;` | Ś | Capital Letter S with acute |
| `;sacute;` | ś | Small Letter S with acute |
| `;Scirc;` | Ŝ | Capital Letter S with circumflex |
| `;scirc;` | ŝ | Small Letter S with circumflex |
| `;Scedil;` | Ş | Capital Letter S with cedilla |
| `;scedil;` | ş | Small Letter S with cedilla |
| `;Scaron;` | Š | Capital Letter S with caron |
| `;scaron;` | š | Small Letter S with caron |
| `;Tcedil;` | Ţ | Capital Letter T with cedilla |
| `;tcedil;` | ţ | Small Letter T with cedilla |
| `;Tcaron;` | Ť | Capital Letter T with caron |
| `;tcaron;` | ť | Small Letter T with caron |
| `;Tstrok;` | Ŧ | Capital Letter T with stroke |
| `;tstrok;` | ŧ | Small Letter T with stroke |
| `;Utilde;` | Ũ | Capital Letter U with tilde |
| `;utilde;` | ũ | Small Letter U with tilde |
| `;Umacr;` | Ū | Capital Letter U with macron |
| `;umacr;` | ū | Small Letter U with macron |
| `;Ubreve;` | Ŭ | Capital Letter U with breve |
| `;ubreve;` | ŭ | Small Letter U with breve |
| `;Uring;` | Ů | Capital Letter U with ring above |
| `;uring;` | ů | Small Letter U with ring above |
| `;Udblac;` | Ű | Capital Letter U with double acute |
| `;udblac;` | ű | Small Letter U with double acute |
| `;Uogon;` | Ų | Capital Letter U with ogonek |
| `;uogon;` | ų | Small Letter U with ogonek |
| `;Wcirc;` | Ŵ | Capital Letter W with circumflex |
| `;wcirc;` | ŵ | Small Letter W with circumflex |
| `;Ycirc;` | Ŷ | Capital Letter Y with circumflex |
| `;ycirc;` | ŷ | Small Letter Y with circumflex |
| `;Yuml;` | Ÿ | Capital Letter Y with diaeresis |
| `;Zacute;` | Ź | Capital Letter Z with acute |
| `;zacute;` | ź | Small Letter Z with acute |
| `;Zdot;` | Ż | Capital Letter Z with dot above |
| `;zdot;` | ż | Small Letter Z with dot above |
| `;Zcaron;` | Ž | Capital Letter Z with caron |
| `;zcaron;` | ž | Small Letter Z with caron |

## Contributions/requests/suggestions

I know this isn't a comprehensive list and there are lots of [math, technical, and other characters that could be added here](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_XML_and_HTML_character_entity_references#List_of_character_entity_references_in_HTML). Feel free to file an issue in my working fork:
https://github.com/dieseltravis/hub/issues
